title: Liberty Blume Appoints New CEO to Lead Next Stage of Expansion
author: Na
description: Liberty Global's back-office solutions provider Liberty Blume has appointed Ian Larkin as Chief Executive Officer, effective April 13, 2026. Larkin brings 25+ years of leadership experience and will lead the company's expansion phase. Liberty Blume, launched in late 2024, has achieved £100+ million in 2025 revenues with 900+ employees across the UK, Ireland, and Netherlands, with ambitions to reach $1 billion+ valuation by 2028.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Liberty Blume, a key subsidiary, has achieved strong financial performance (£100M+ annual revenue) and is expanding with an experienced CEO appointment. The company demonstrates growth trajectory with ambitious $1B+ valuation target by 2028, indicating strong business momentum and strategic investment in scaling operations.

title: Liberty Global Strikes Five-Year Google Cloud Deal To Deploy Gemini AI Across Europe
author: Namrata Sen
description: Liberty Global has signed a five-year partnership with Google Cloud to deploy Gemini AI models across its European operations serving 80 million connections. The deal includes AI-driven features for Horizon TV, automated customer service, and distribution of Google hardware products through Liberty's operating units including Virgin Media O2, Telenet, VodafoneZiggo, and Sunrise.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The partnership expands Google Cloud's AI footprint in Europe with a major five-year deal, demonstrating strong demand for Gemini AI services and supporting Alphabet's AI-driven growth momentum.

title: Lancaster Opens $7 Million Position in 10x Genomics (TXG)
author: Emma Newbery
description: Lancaster Investment Management acquired a new $7.27 million position in 10x Genomics during Q3 2025, purchasing 621,779 shares representing 3.1% of its assets under management.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite being down 41.5% over the past year, the company shows potential through recent partnerships with SPT Labtech and Anthropic that could drive future demand

title: Coherent Showcases Next-Generation Optical Innovations at ECOC 2025
author: Coherent Corp.
description: Coherent Corp. showcased advanced optical communication technologies at ECOC 2025, including a 2D VCSEL Array, 100G ZR single-fiber module, and quantum-safe networking solutions for datacenters and telecommunications infrastructure.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is presenting multiple innovative technologies, demonstrating technological leadership in optical communications and showcasing advancements in datacenter and telecommunications networking
